svg.text: Exploded configuration states, flight order · companion to Sheet 1 general arrangement
pod + mission stage + launch core + boosters
core + mission stage continue under Swivel only
mission stage isolated with Terrier propulsion
orbit, TMI, flyby, trim before final separation
capsule + heat shield + chute — final config
Staging doctrine: one propulsion handoff at the core/mission interface, then a final capsule-only entry separation.
Kerbal Space Program — mission documentation appendix
